results.title: Joom investing €160 million in Portugal
results.snippet: The Joom group, which was founded in Latvia, will invest another 160 million euros in Portugal, after having invested around 41 million euros in the last two ...
results.summary:
The Joom group, which was founded in Latvia, will invest another 160 million euros in Portugal, after having invested around 41 million euros in the last two years, when it decided to move its headquarters from Riga to Lisbon.
...
Joom has opened its office on Rua Alexandre Herculano, one of the city's main roads, becoming WeWork's neighbour with a 2,023 m2 space divided into two floors with work areas, meeting rooms, a kitchen with a private barista in the morning and an auditorium.
